title: Monitor livestock production growing environments
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor livestock production growing environments demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor livestock health and welfare

pcs.text: Identify production plan information and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify production plan information and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify production plan information and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Identify and report non-productive and slow growing livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report non-productive and slow growing livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report non-productive and slow growing livestock.

pcs.text: Assess animals for overall health and welfare
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess animals for overall health and welfare?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess animals for overall health and welfare.

elements.title: Monitor the production environment

pcs.text: Monitor environmental parameters according to the production plan and adjust as required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor hygiene and welfare procedures and adjust as required.

pcs.text: Monitor disposal of waste and debris

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor disposal of waste and debris.

elements.title: Monitor feed

pcs.text: Monitor feed to ensure the correct diet is offered to livestock for optimum production

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feed to ensure the correct diet is offered to livestock for optimum production.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor feed to ensure fresh palatable feed is available to livestock.

elements.title: Perform routine maintenance checks

pcs.text: Check all buildings, structures and production areas for wear and tear

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment for delivering water and feed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment for delivering water and feed.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment controlling the housing environment.

elements.title: Complete monitoring activities

pcs.text: Report livestock health and welfare issues, production environment, feed, and maintenance problems to supervisor
